title: Homebrew rules
content:
• We'll be using the Matt Mercer rules for reviving characters.

  • We will not be whisper rolling death saves.

  • Anyone who wants to can provide a memory from their life when they have to roll a death save.

  • If you take an action to drink a potion, you regain the max amount of health.

  • Anyone who would like me to roll a check for them (ie. to perform a subtle roll) can do so.

  • Rolling a Nat 20 on initiative will not provide any benefit.

  • Flanking an enemy will give you advantage on your attack rolls.

  • Regular spell components and ammunition will not require you to purchase them, however gold costs for spells must be paid.

  • Spellcasters and only use one spell slot per turn.

  • Anytime you cast a spell that uses a spell slot (in or our of combat) for whatever reason, it will use that spell slot.

  • There will be a deck of player safety on the screen at all times. For anyone who is unfamiliar, I will go over how to use it in our next session.
